channel.title: AIIB Job Vacancies
channel.description: Current job opportunities at Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank (AIIB)

item.title: Senior Investment Officer - Financial Institutions - West Asia / Non-Regional Members
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Senior Investment Officer - Financial Institutions - West Asia / Non-Regional Members. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: May 08, 2026.

item.title: Workspace and Facility Management Associate
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Workspace and Facility Management Associate. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 29, 2026.

item.title: Counsel - Private Sector Investment Operations
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Counsel - Private Sector Investment Operations. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 29, 2026.

item.title: Finance Officer, Financial Accounting and Reporting
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Finance Officer, Financial Accounting and Reporting. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 28, 2026.

item.title: Manager, Shareholder Relations
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Manager, Shareholder Relations. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 21, 2026.

item.title: Principal Finance Officer, Head of Financial Accounting and Reporting
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Principal Finance Officer, Head of Financial Accounting and Reporting. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 20, 2026.

item.title: Principal Finance Officer, Head of Loan Management
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Principal Finance Officer, Head of Loan Management. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 20, 2026.
